narrative:
North Canton 1-C (precinct in Stark County) has 927 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
